sections.selectedWorksSubtitle: A glimpse into my recent work.
sections.servicesSubtitle: I provide end-to-end digital solutions focused on high performance, modern UI, and seamless user experience.

hero.title:
Fast, clear websites,
built to grow with your business.
hero.subtitle: I help businesses and SMEs build fast, user-friendly, and scalable websites.

about.text:
I've been fascinated by building things for as long as I can remember. When I was younger, I started exploring programming through **Godot**, where I created small games and discovered how rewarding it feels to turn an idea into something real.

As my curiosity grew, I wanted to build my own website, so I began learning HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. My very first website was, honestly, far from good—but to me, it represented something much bigger: the beginning of a journey.

Since then, I've continued improving my skills, focusing on creating fast, clean, and thoughtful web experiences. Every project teaches me something new, and I still enjoy the same feeling that inspired me from the start—building useful things that people can actually use.

philosophy:
Simplicity in Code, Clarity in design.
I believe that complexity is the enemy of progress. In code, simplicity means maintainability and performance. In design, clarity means an intuitive experience where the user never has to guess. My approach is to strip away the noise until only what is essential remains.

certificates.title: From Zero to Your First AI Agent

projects.title: Airtiqa
projects.tech: React / Vite / Tailwind CSS / React Router / Swiper
projects.desc: A modern bilingual university platform designed for Airtiqa University Center, featuring seamless Arabic and English support, dynamic news management, interactive content sections, and a responsive experience focused on student engagement and accessibility.

projects.title: ColorLab
projects.desc: An AI-powered color system generator that creates professional UI palettes from a single base color. Designed for modern SaaS products, it provides harmony modes, dark-mode optimization, and instant export options for designers and developers.

projects.title: GridX
projects.desc: An interactive coding game that teaches programming logic through real-time JavaScript execution. Players solve challenges by controlling a character on a grid while learning loops, conditions, and problem-solving in an engaging environment.

projects.title: ControlTap
projects.desc: A browser extension that enhances user control and productivity by simplifying tab management and providing quick-access actions.

services.title: Frontend Development
services.desc: Building fast, responsive, and accessible web interfaces with React and Tailwind CSS.

services.title: UI/UX to Code
services.desc: Converting Figma designs into pixel-perfect, high-performance web components.

services.title: Chrome Extensions
services.desc: Developing custom browser tools to automate tasks and improve user productivity.
